response.justification: Szabo brings strong geospatial domain expertise and proven ability to learn across the full technical stack, but his modern C++ and Rust production experience is significantly outdated (last C++ role was 2014-2015), and he lacks direct navigation/routing systems experience. While his software craftsmanship, distributed systems knowledge, and willingness to expand expertise align with role values, the gap in systems-level programming for the primary technology stack presents material risk for a mid-senior individual contributor position.
strengths: Deep geospatial domain knowledge from founding GISCollective and multiple mapping projects
Demonstrates comfort working across full technical stack and ramping up in new domains rapidly
Strong software craftsmanship fundamentals including TDD, distributed systems experience, and infrastructure work
concerns: Most recent C++ production work was 2014-2015 at National Instruments; no Rust experience mentioned or demonstrated
No documented experience with navigation systems, routing algorithms, or routing data pipeline architecture
Recent career trajectory (2021-present) has focused on web applications and AI infrastructure rather than systems programming
